quality_highlights: safe_outputs_validation.go: validateTargetValue (lines 167-179) is exemplary — provides 'Did you mean?' suggestion for common typos plus a full enumerated list of valid options. validateSafeOutputsAllowWorkflows embeds a copy-paste-ready YAML fix block inline in the error.
mcps.md: Top-of-page IMPORTANT callout sets security expectation immediately (read-only MCPs, write via safe-outputs). Shared MCP Configurations table provides excellent discoverability.
add_command.go: Seven concrete examples covering all major access patterns (three-part org/repo/name, four-part with explicit .md, GitHub URL, local file, wildcard) give users a clear mental model.

single_file_improvements.issue: Lines 74-86: Multi-Job Pattern example omits actions/upload-artifact step in run-analysis job. Artifact 'analysis-results' downloaded by agent has no corresponding upload. Also actions/checkout@v6 and actions/download-artifact@v6 reference non-existent versions (v4 is current). Users following this pattern get 'artifact not found' errors.

Line 34: run-failure message 'Doctor needs assistance...' ends with ellipsis (implies suspended state) and provides no actionable guidance. Enterprise users triaging alerts need concrete next steps, not theatrical framing.
